name: fraud_rule_oid
description: UltraCart unique identifier for this fraud rule

name: merchant_id
description: UltraCart merchant ID owning this fraud rule

name: rule_type
description: For a list of valid rule types, see getFraudRuleTypes

name: rule_group
description: Rule types are grouped for GUI purposes

name: failure_action
description: Action to take if order fails this fraud rule

name: auto_note
description: Note that is automatically appended to the merchant_note field of an order failing this fraud rule.

name: decline_message
description: Message displayed to customer if their order fails this fraud rule.

name: param1
description: Parameter value for this fraud rule which meaning depends on the rule_type

name: param2
description: Parameter value for this fraud rule which meaning depends on the rule_type

name: param3
description: Parameter value for this fraud rule which meaning depends on the rule_type

name: param4
description: Parameter value for this fraud rule which meaning depends on the rule_type

name: user_action
description: User action will be Approved, Attempted, or null.  Used to refine the fraud rule to a specific action.

name: affiliate_oid
description: Unique object identifier for an (optional) affiliate tied to this fraud rule

name: item_filters
description: Optional list of items restricting this fraud rule to orders containing one or more of these items

fields.name: merchant_item_oid
fields.description: Unique object identifier of this item

fields.name: merchant_item_id
fields.description: Unique item id of this item filter

name: rotating_transaction_gateway_filters
description: Optional list of rotating transaction gateways restricting this fraud rule to orders processed by one of these gateways

fields.name: rotating_transaction_gateway_oid
fields.description: Unique object identifier of a rotating transaction gateway filtering this fraud rule to only orders processed by this gateway

fields.name: code
fields.description: The short code identifier of this rotating transaction gateway used to filter this fraud rule

name: storefront_filters
description: Optional list of storefronts restricting this fraud rule to orders associated with one or more storefronts

fields.name: screen_branding_theme_code
fields.description: Screen branding theme code associated with this storefront (legacy checkouts)

name: description
description: Convenience string describing this rule, used by UltraCart GUI (not persisted)

name: description_html
description: Convenience html string describing this rule, used by UltraCart GUI (not persisted)

name: modify_skip_affiliate
description: When true any order that fails this fraud rule skips affiliate association

name: modify_skip_affiliate_network_pixel
description: When true any order that fails this fraud rule skips/ignores any affiliate network pixel

name: modify_custom_field1
description: Any order that fails this fraud rule will have this custom field set to this value

name: modify_custom_field2
description: Any order that fails this fraud rule will have this custom field set to this value

name: modify_custom_field3
description: Any order that fails this fraud rule will have this custom field set to this value

name: modify_custom_field4
description: Any order that fails this fraud rule will have this custom field set to this value

name: modify_custom_field5
description: Any order that fails this fraud rule will have this custom field set to this value

name: modify_custom_field6
description: Any order that fails this fraud rule will have this custom field set to this value

name: modify_custom_field7
description: Any order that fails this fraud rule will have this custom field set to this value

name: card_number
description: If this fraud rule is associated to a specific card number, this is the masked value

name: created_by
description: The UltraCart user who created this fraud rule

name: created_dts
description: Created date
